modules.name: Identity & Access
modules.description: Employee records, roles (Employee / Manager / HR Admin), and manager hierarchy. Drives all access control decisions.
responsibilities: Create and manage employee records
Assign and change roles
Maintain manager-to-employee relationships

modules.name: Leave Type Management
modules.description: HR Admin-managed catalogue of leave types with advance notice rules and balance flags.
responsibilities: Define and maintain leave types
Store advance notice requirements per type
Flag whether a leave type deducts from a balance pool

modules.name: Leave Balance
modules.description: Tracks each employee's leave entitlement and usage per leave type per year. Updated atomically on approval and restored on cancellation.
responsibilities: Initialize balances for new employees and new leave years
Validate available balance before submission
Deduct balance on approval
Restore balance on cancellation of approved leave
Provide balance summary to employees and HR Admin

modules.name: Leave Request
modules.description: Core module. Handles the full lifecycle of a leave request: submission, validation, approval, rejection, modification, and cancellation.
responsibilities: Accept and validate new leave requests (balance, advance notice, overlap)
Route requests to the direct manager
Process manager approve / reject decisions
Handle employee modifications of pending or approved requests
Handle employee cancellations of pending or approved requests
Trigger balance updates and notifications on state changes

modules.name: Audit Trail
modules.description: Append-only log of all state changes across all leave requests. Satisfies audit and compliance requirements.
responsibilities: Record every state transition with actor, timestamp, and optional snapshot
Expose read-only audit log per request and per employee

modules.name: Notifications
modules.description: Email notification dispatch triggered by leave request events. Records delivery status for traceability.
responsibilities: Determine recipients for each event type
Compose and dispatch email notifications
Record notification status (PENDING / SENT / FAILED)
